name: deep-search
author: octos
description: Deep multi-round web research: iterative search across multiple angles, parallel page crawling, reference chasing, and structured report generation.

tools.name: deep_search
tools.description: Perform deep multi-round web research on a topic. Searches from multiple angles (follow-up queries, time-qualified, controversy), fetches all pages in parallel, chases most-referenced external sources, and produces a structured research report saved to disk. The report file path is printed at the end of the output.

query.description: The research topic or question to investigate

depth.description: Research depth: 1=quick (single search + crawl, ~1min), 2=standard (3 search rounds + reference chasing, ~3min), 3=thorough (5 search rounds + aggressive link chasing, ~5min). Default: 2

max_results.description: Number of search results per round (1-10, default: 8)

search_engine.description: Preferred search engine: perplexity, duckduckgo, brave, you (default: auto-detect, prefers perplexity)

synthesis_config.description: Synthesis LLM provider config injected by the host. When all four fields are populated, takes precedence over the legacy DEEPSEEK_API_KEY/etc env-var path. Operators should not set this directly — the host populates it from the agent's configured provider.

api_key.description: Bearer token for the synthesis provider. Never logged.

model.description: Model id to request (e.g. deepseek-chat). Overridable via DEEP_SEARCH_SYNTHESIS_MODEL env.

provider.description: Provider label used by the v2 cost envelope (e.g. deepseek).
